title: gardenia jasminoides var. plena
intro: Gardenia jasminoides var. plena, also known as the double gardenia, is a variety of the gardenia jasminoides plant, characterized by its double-layered, highly fragrant flowers. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting relaxation, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Gardenia jasminoides var. plena include tea infusions, essential oil extracts, and dried flowers that can be used in aromatherapy and traditional medicine.
